parameters.jsCode:
return items.map(item => ({
  json: {
    source: "meta_ads",
    event_type: "daily_performance",
    payload_json: {
      "data": item.json["Day"],
      "adSetName": item.json["Ad Set Name"],
      "campaignName": item.json["Campaign Name"],
      "alcance": item.json["Reach"],
      "impressoes": item.json["Impressions"],
      "frequencia": item.json["Frequency"],
      "resultados": item.json["Results"],
      "custoPorResultado": item.json["Cost per Result"],
      "valorGasto": item.json["Amount Spent"],
      "cpm": item.json["CPM (Cost per 1,000 Impressions)"],
      "cliquesLink": item.json["Link Clicks"],
      "cpc": item.json["CPC (Cost per Link Click)"],
      "ctr": item.json["CTR (Link Click-Through Rate)"],
      "videoWatches25": item.json["Video Watches at 25%"],
      "videoWatches50": item.json["Video Watches at 50%"],
      "videoWatches75": item.json["Video Watches at 75%"],
      "videoWatches95": item.json["Video Watches at 95%"],
      "conversoesMensagens": item.json["Messaging Conversations Started"],
      "custoPorConversaoMensagem": item.json["Cost per Messaging Conversations Started"]
    }
  }
}));
